2.0.0.0

options.name: --minor
options.description:
Increment the minor version eg 1.0.0.0 ->
1.1.0.0

options.name: --revision
options.description:
Increment the revision version eg 1.0.0.0 ->
1.0.0.1

arguments.description:
The unique name of the solution to increment 
version
